positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical illustration of a mythical celestial floral wreath framing a central point. The composition should feature bioluminescent elements, intertwining lunar vines, and abstract cosmic dust patterns mixed with deeply saturated, stylized tropical flowers like iridescent orchids and giant lotus blossoms. Use a Neo-Art Deco vaporwave style with strong contrast and clean, bold silhouettes. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, electric teal, gold leaf accents, and vibrant magenta, set against a dark, velvety background. Perfect central composition, suitable for single-chest apparel print. Vector art quality, high detail, smooth gradients, mystical, ethereal, fantasy flora.
